expectations.evidence: ls -la shows no .prettierignore in outputs dir.

expectations.text: .oxfmtrc.json was created with correct default config
package.json format script uses oxfmt (not prettier)
expectations.evidence: package.json format script: "oxfmt --check \"**/*.{js,jsx,ts,tsx,md,html,css,json,jsonc,yaml,toml}\"". prettier removed from devDependencies.

expectations.text: eslint-config-prettier is present in devDependencies (ESLint+formatter wiring)

eval_feedback.overall: All 4 assertions pass but this matches with_skill — non-discriminating. Note: old_skill used older pinned versions (oxfmt@0.1.0, eslint-config-prettier@9.1.0) rather than the ≥7-day-old constraint — the supply-chain version check was not followed correctly.
